_provenance: V1.7 phase-7 voice pack (V1.7_post_court_payoff.md). Source draft: narrative_revision/phase_7_drafts/V1_7_draft_pass5.md (pass 5 — commit shape; pass-4 arbitration baked in).
_scope: postcard_swine_ch1.json owns the Beat-14 final stinger at the close of Chapter 1. It fires after the celebration sequence (Beat 13) has completed and the team has dispersed back to work. Asia announces the postcard; Mr. Pig reads the body aloud; Whimsy delivers a single archaic-deflection beat. The chapter closes with the Day-One Survivor badge and route unlocks.
_engine_flags_required: Fires when chapter1.court_won_procedural_reset == true and chapter1.beat13_complete == true. On dismiss of the final state, sets chapter1.complete = true and unlocks routes: residential, business_district, court_plaza. Awards badge: day_one_survivor.
_address_forms: Asia addresses Pig as 'Mr. Pig'. Pig reads Swine's postcard text aloud verbatim. Swine's postcard address line: 'To Mr. Pig, Pig & Swine, Warsaw'.

states.trigger: chapter1.court_won_procedural_reset == true && chapter1.beat13_complete == true && chapter1.postcard_asia_announced == false
states._comment: Asia reads the postcard address label as part of her sorting cycle. Hands do not stop. Three short declaratives.
states.speaker: asia
lines: Mr. Pig. Postcard. The address says Sapporo.

states._comment: Stage direction: Pig takes the postcard and reads the body aloud. Pig is not in on the joke. He reads sincerely.
states.speaker: stage_direction
lines: Pig turns the postcard over. The front shows a snowy building and a sign too small to read at this distance. Pig reads the body aloud.

states._comment: Mr. Pig reads Swine's Postcard 1 body aloud verbatim. H6 Postcard 1 family: greeting from Sapporo + vague-cosmopolitan business opportunity + direct stay-solvent. Three sentences.
states.speaker: pig
lines: Greetings from Sapporo. A very serious gentleman in the lobby has proposed a venture involving conference centers and a fisheries contact, and I have given him my card on principle. Keep Pig & Swine afloat in my absence.

_postcard_metadata.address_line: To Mr. Pig, Pig & Swine, Warsaw

states._comment: Pig's one-sentence reaction. Maritime continuity from the retainer aside (Beat 13). Distractable-anxious register. Pig does not flag the continuity; the player carries it.
states.speaker: pig

states._comment: Whimsy registers the postcard's existence as theatre. Single archaic-deflection beat. One short construction. Per pack §B.5 Beat 14 spec.
states.speaker: whimsy

states._comment: Chapter close. The postcard sits on Pig's desk. Ledger drawer closed. Asia's mail stack thinner. Case board still carries the third-clause note. Badge and route unlocks fire here.
states.speaker: stage_direction
lines: The postcard remains on Pig's desk. The ledger drawer is closed. Asia's mail stack is thinner. The case board still carries the third-clause note until someone erases it for the next matter.
